title: Jamaican Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender beef and a blend of Jamaican spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove beef from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add broth and water, whisking constantly.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
Add brown sugar and tomato paste and stir to combine.
Return beef to pot and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
Season with piquant and Jamaican seasoning to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
